input.command: wc -l <benchmark>/spec/large.json && python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('<benchmark>/spec/large.json')); print('domains:', len(d['domains'])); [print(dom['name'], 'types:', len(dom.get('types',[])), 'services:', len(dom.get('services',[]))) for dom in d['domains']]"

input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
d=json.load(open('<benchmark>/spec/large.json'))
# print first service to understand structure
for dom in d['domains']:
    print('=== Domain:', dom['name'])
    for t in dom.get('types', []):
        print('  type:', t['name'], 'kind:', t['kind'])
    for s in dom.get('services', []):
        print('  service:', s['name'])
        for m in s.get('methods', []):
            print('    method:', m)
    break  # only first domain
"
